💝 Sponsor TechAI Explained

Complex tech. Simple explanations. — Help us keep it going.

TechAI Explained is an open-source educational platform creating free, high-quality tutorials on AI, Kubernetes, DevOps, and modern software architecture. Your sponsorship directly funds new content, better diagrams, and video production.

Sponsorship Tiers

☕ Community Supporter — $5/month

Perfect for individual developers who find our content valuable.

You get:

  • 🏷️ Name listed on our Sponsors page
  • 🔔 Early access to new tutorials (48 hours before public)
  • 💬 Access to sponsor-only Discord channel
  • 🙏 Our sincere gratitude

🚀 Pro Sponsor — $25/month

For developers and small teams who rely on our content regularly.

Everything in Community, plus:

  • 📝 Vote on upcoming tutorial topics
  • 📦 Access to downloadable code bundles and cheat sheets
  • 🎯 Monthly "Ask Me Anything" thread (priority answers)
  • 🏷️ Logo/name featured in tutorial footer
  • 📧 Monthly sponsor-only newsletter with advanced tips

🏢 Enterprise Sponsor — $100/month

For companies that want to support developer education and get visibility.

Everything in Pro, plus:

  • 🖼️ Company logo on homepage and all tutorial pages
  • 📣 Sponsor shoutout in video scripts and YouTube descriptions
  • 🔗 Permanent backlink from our Resources page
  • 📊 Quarterly impact report (content views, community growth)
  • 🤝 Direct line to the team for content suggestions
  • 📝 One sponsored tutorial topic per quarter

Why Sponsor?

What Your Support Funds Impact
📝 Written tutorials 15+ tutorials published, 50K+ words
🎥 Video production Voice generation, editing, YouTube uploads
📚 Course development Kubernetes course with 5 hands-on lessons
🛠️ Code examples 200+ tested, runnable code samples
🌐 Free hosting GitHub Pages, zero barriers to access

By the Numbers

  • 15+ published tutorials
  • 5 Kubernetes course lessons
  • 9 video scripts in production
  • 200+ code examples
  • 100% free and open source

How to Sponsor

GitHub Sponsors (Preferred)

The easiest way to support us with monthly contributions:

👉 Sponsor on GitHub

One-Time Contributions

Want to make a one-time donation instead?

  • Buy Me a Coffee
  • Direct via GitHub Sponsors (one-time option available)

Questions?

Open an issue on GitHub or reach out via the links on our About page.
